subject: Subspace relay drops when switching between comm arrays
description: Every time we rotate from the primary dish to the backup phased array, the subspace link drops and has to be re-established manually. Started after last Tuesday's firmware patch on the comm controller. Using CommLink v3.2 on Array Alpha, Deck 4 relay junction.

subject: Flight planning console crashes and nav computer showing old waypoints
description: Two problems since swapping to a replacement console yesterday: (1) The flight planning module shows a blank screen then crashes on launch — tried cold-rebooting twice. (2) The nav computer is displaying waypoints from a mission we completed months ago that I already purged. Both started right after the console swap. Might be related, might not.

subject: Holographic display down in Command Briefing Room
description: The holographic projector in the main Command Briefing Room won't initialize. Tried the console controls and the manual override panel. The Zeridian delegation is arriving in ~25 minutes for the final treaty review on the Outer Rim mining accord — Admiral Vasquez is presenting. No backup room fits 12 species representatives. Can someone come immediately?

subject: URGENT — all systems failing!!!
description: Nothing works. I cant access anything. My console is just spinning. Please fix ASAP i have a shift report due today and my section chief is already asking for the deliverable.

subject: Re: [Signal SIG-0847] Scheduled maintenance notification
description:
Thank you for letting me know. I will be entering cryo-sleep from March 24-28 with limited access to comms. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Alex at alex.wu@contoso.com.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma
Director of Mission Planning

subject: Unauthorized access attempts on my crew profile
description: Got 6 access alert notifications this morning — someone tried to log into my crew profile from Sector 7G, the uncharted region near the Valen Nebula. I haven't been off-station. Changed my credentials already but worried the profile may already be compromised. I have classified mission dossiers and diplomatic documents stored in my personal data vault. Should I be concerned about data exposure?

subject: Nightly telemetry pipeline failing — auth 403 against central data banks
description: Pipeline 'prod-sensor-ingest' failing since 03:00 UTC with 403 Forbidden on the central data banks. Service token may have expired or the Telemetry Data Contributor role got removed during last week's access audit cleanup. This feeds the anomaly detection model used for the Monday command briefing. Pipeline runs out of Data Core Alpha, sector-telemetry-prod. Last successful run Saturday 03:00 UTC.

subject: Low priority — minor reactor telemetry issue
description: Hey team. The primary reactor telemetry system has been returning timeout errors for 2 hours. ~40% of sensor queries to the reactor monitoring grid are failing with data gaps. Engineers are seeing intermittent blanks on their readout consoles. Diagnostics show buffer pool exhaustion on the primary data collector. Marked as low priority since the backup collector is still handling some telemetry. Let me know when you get a chance.

subject: Re: SIG-2834 — Airlock access still broken, Habitat Module 7
description: Following up on SIG-2834 from last week. My biometric scan still doesn't work for Habitat Module 7 after the access system migration. Was told it'd be fixed by Friday — it's Monday and I still can't get in. Have to wait for someone to cycle the airlock manually every morning. Third time reporting this.

subject: New crew member arriving March 31 — full station provisioning needed
description:
New senior exobiologist (Alex Rivera) arriving via transport shuttle March 31. Needs:
- Personal console (Mark IV terminal, 32TB memory core)
- Standard station software + SciAnalyzer/BioScope/LabNet
- Access to Exobiology Lab systems (lab-cluster-alpha)
- Stellar Cartography data read access
- Habitat Module 3 biometric enrollment
- Added to science-team comms channel and briefing distribution

Reports to me. Please have everything ready by March 28 for a walkthrough.

subject: Biometric scan not working on my personal device
description: I'm getting a new error every time I try to approve the biometric prompt on my wrist comm. The authenticator shows the scan notification but when I place my palm it says 'Biometric mismatch — please retry'. Tried recalibrating and re-enrolling my handprint, same result. I can still log in using voice confirmation codes but that's slower. Not super urgent, just annoying.

subject: FYI — sensor display flickering on science console
description: The display on my science station console started flickering around 10am. It's not constant — happens for a few seconds every 5-10 minutes. I swapped the optic cable to a different port and it still does it. The sensor data itself seems fine, readings are updating. Just the display. Also, unrelated — can you check if my flight planning software license is still active? I got an expiry warning last week but I can still log in.

subject: Classified data exposed via unsecured data link — immediate attention needed
description: During a routine security sweep, we discovered that a data repository containing personnel files for ~1,200 crew members on the Kepler Station outpost was shared externally via an unsecured data link with 'Any vessel with the frequency' permissions. The link has been accessible since at least February 15. We've severed the connection as of this morning but need to determine: (1) who created the open link, (2) whether unauthorized vessels accessed the data, and (3) whether this triggers a notification obligation under Interstellar Data Protection Protocol. This is a potential security incident.

subject: thanks!
description: got it working, appreciate the quick turnaround. you folks are the best crew on this station!! 🎉

subject: Slight delay in navigation telemetry — may be nothing
description: Noticing about a 200ms delay in navigation telemetry refresh from the outer beacon array this morning. Normally we're at ~50ms. Latency seems to spike right around 09:00 station time and hasn't recovered. Not sure if it's our relay or the beacon network. The helm officers haven't complained yet but if this gets to 500ms during the next course correction burn we'll have a real problem. Just flagging early.

subject: Flight planner won't load after credential rotation
description: Rotated my station credentials this morning per the quarterly security policy. Now the flight planning console gives me 'SSO token invalid — contact your systems administrator'. Tried logging out and back in to the station network, same issue. Other systems (comms, nav display, data archives) work fine. I need the flight planner to finalize the end-of-cycle mission logs — close of shift today is the deadline.

subject: Emergency beacon — garbled transmission, crew member needs help with something
description:
[Transcribed from emergency beacon, 15:42 station time]

Caller: Hi yeah so um my thing... the thing on my console... it keeps doing the... you know when you tap the panel and it goes to the... [static] ...and then nothing happens? I've been trying for like two rotations. My colleague Janet said to ping you on the beacon. I think it might be the... [static] ...something about access clearance? I don't know. Can someone just come look at it? I'm on Deck 5, near the mess hall. My name's Bob. No wait, Robert. Robert Chen. Not the Robert Chen in stellar cartography, the other one.

subject: Admiral Vasquez can't share tactical display in command briefing — happening now
description: Admiral Vasquez (Commander, Deep Space Operations) is in the command briefing right now and can't project his tactical display to the main holotable. The briefing is with the Admiralty Board and allied fleet commanders. He's tried projecting from both his personal console and the room's integrated display system. Other officers can project fine. His console shows 'Display sharing is restricted by station security policy.' Briefing has been going on for 10 minutes without his presentation. He's requesting someone report to the Command Deck briefing room immediately.

subject: Crew member departing station — last day March 21
description:
Jessica Palmer (jessica.palmer@contoso.com) in the Mission Oversight division has submitted her transfer request. Her last rotation on CDSS is Friday March 21. Please:
- Disable her station access credentials at 18:00 UTC on March 21
- Revoke subspace relay access and all remote system privileges
- Wipe her assigned console (Mark IV terminal, asset tag CDSS-T-4892)
- Transfer ownership of her data archives and shared files to her supervisor David Liu (david.liu@contoso.com)
- Remove her from all comms channels and briefing distribution lists
- Archive her message logs per our 7-cycle retention policy

Note: Jessica has access to sensitive mission investigation files. Please ensure these are preserved but not accessible after her departure.

subject: Fabricator on Deck 3 not working
description: The main fabricator near the crew lounge on Deck 3 stopped producing parts. Jobs go to the queue but nothing materializes. I tried submitting from my console and from the wall terminal next to it — same result. The fabricator display shows 'Ready' and material hoppers are full. Other crew on the deck are having the same issue. We need it for replacement hull panels that go out on today's EVA.

subject: How do I book a briefing pod?
description: Hi, I just transferred to the station last week and I need to reserve the large briefing pod on Deck 4 for a team gathering on Friday. I checked the station scheduling system but I can't figure out how to add it. Is there a special reservation channel or something? Also, do I need to request rations through Mission Control or is that a different department? Thanks!

subject: Security certificate expiring on external comm relay — 3 days left
description: Our monitoring flagged that the encryption certificate on relay-alpha.contoso.com expires on March 20. This is the primary external comm relay that all allied vessel handshakes go through. If the cert expires, every incoming transmission will start failing with encryption errors. The cert was originally provisioned manually by a comm officer who transferred off-station 6 months ago. I don't know if auto-renewal was ever configured. We need to renew or replace it before Thursday.

subject: I think my console has been compromised
description: My console has been super sluggish for two rotations. Programs take forever to load, the cooling fans run constantly, and I got a couple of weird pop-ups that said something about 'updating system firmware.' I think it might have been compromised from that data packet I accidentally opened last week. I ran the station's security scanner and it didn't find anything but I'm still worried. Should I not use the console until someone checks it?

subject: Fwd: You have won 5,000,000 credits — claim on subspace now!!!
description:
---------- Forwarded transmission ----------
From: Galactic Prize Authority <claims@totallylegit-prizes.darkspace>
Date: March 16, 2026
Subject: You have won 5,000,000 credits — claim on subspace now!!!

Dear Valued Crew Member,

Congratulations! Your comm frequency has been selected as the winner of our annual Interstellar Comm Lottery. You have won the sum of 5,000,000 galactic credits.

To claim your prize, please transmit on the frequency below and provide your full name, crew ID, and station access codes:
subspace://claim-your-prize.totallylegit-prizes.darkspace

--- end forwarded transmission ---

Hey Mission Control — got this transmission, is this legit? Should I respond? Looks suspicious but I don't want to miss out if it's real.

subject: Analytics module 'prod-analytics-01' unreachable since maintenance reboot
description: Compute module prod-analytics-01 (Class-E16 processor, Data Core Alpha, sector-analytics-prod) became unreachable after a scheduled reboot at 05:00 UTC for firmware patching. Direct link and remote shell both timeout. Station diagnostics show the module status as 'Online' but boot logs show it stuck at 'Applying system configuration'. Firewall rules haven't changed. This module runs the analytics dashboard that the command staff uses for the morning briefing at 09:00 UTC. We have about 2 hours.
